title: pv-addon-whisper
description:
Server-side Plasmo Voice add-on.

By default, whisper is half of the current proximity distance. You can change the percentage in the config.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/AsiGOED.png)
Plasmo Voice | Modrinth | GitHub | Discord | Patreon
# pv-addon-whisper Server-side [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/mod/plasmo-voice) add-on. By default, whisper is half of the current proximity distance. You can change the percentage in the config. ## Usage Open Plasmo Voice menu `V` (by default), go to `Activation` tab and configure the `Whisper` activation. ## Permissions Permission to use whisper: `pv.activation.whisper`
